description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gcc Docker image. Define a single job named build (runs in the default stage) that runs an apt update && apt install -y qt5-qmake libqt5core5a libqt5network5 libqt5gui5 libqt5widgets5 qtbase5-dev qttools5-dev in its before_script, caches all files matching "*.o", then executes "QT_SELECT=qt5 qmake&&make" in the script, and finally uploads the "cutentr" directory as an artifact. No services, variables, or additional stages are defined.
